zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Bekering於大約1272年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Thomas de Bekering III25歲，母親Cecilia de Markham20歲。他與Isabel de Beckering結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1326年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Bekering于大约1272年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Bekering III25岁，母亲Cecilia de Markham20岁。他与Isabel de Beckering结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1326年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Bekering was born about 1272, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas de Bekering III, was 25 and his mother, Cecilia de Markham, was 20. He married Isabel de Beckering. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1326, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Bekering est né environ 1272, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Bekering III, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Cecilia de Markham, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Beckering. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1326, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Bekering um 1272 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Bekering III 25 und seine Mutter Cecilia de Markham 20. Er hat Isabel de Beckering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1326 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Bekering è nato il circa 1272 nel Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Bekering III, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia de Markham, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Beckering. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1326, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Bekeringが約1272年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Bekering IIIは25歳，母Cecilia de Markhamは20歳であった。Isabel de Beckeringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1326年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Bekering(이)가 대략 1272년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Bekering III(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia de Markham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Isabel de Beckering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1326년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Beckering, Lincolnshire, England: Beckering, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Bekering nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Bekering III, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia de Markham, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Beckering. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1326, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Bekering родился около 1272 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Bekering III было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia de Markham, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Beckering. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1326 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Bekering nació aproximadamente 1272, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Bekering III, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Cecilia de Markham, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabel de Beckering. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1326, a la edad de 55 años.
